rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background bg-white with 1px border-slate-200, hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

sections.name: Navbar
features: Logo text: 'CP y PCPLDA Octavio Mendoza'

sections.name: Hero
features: Slogan: 'Excelencia profesional con ética y responsabilidad'

sections.name: Quiénes Somos
features: Animated stats counter (22 años, 8 servicios, 1 socio)

sections.name: Valores
features: Grid of 7 values with Lucide icons
Integridad, Objetividad, Diligencia, Confidencialidad, Comportamiento, Ética, Responsabilidad

sections.name: Servicios
features: Services: Asesoría Fiscal, Contabilidad, Cumplimiento Normativo, PLD, Anticorrupción, Capacitación, Auditoría, Gobierno Corporativo
Each card shows description and requirements on hover or click

sections.name: Blog
features: Creative placeholder to indicate future content for entrepreneurs

sections.name: Contacto
features: Office address: Chiapa de Corzo, Chiapas

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react, framer-motion, react-countup if needed.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-button').
Use Tailwind colors: slate for neutral/text, sky-600 to blue-900 for brand colors.
Do not use placeholder text for images, only use the provided image URLs.
For Google Map, embed a simple iframe pointing to Chiapa de Corzo, Chiapas.
Make the Hero section use the 'Hero Background' image with a heavy dark overlay (e.g. bg-slate-900/60) and white text to ensure contrast.
Ensure the fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans) are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or index.css.
Use generous padding (py-24 or py-32) for all main sections.
